title: Market Brief — Thursday, June 4, 2026
summary: GPU supply is loosening fast across every class except H100. Util-avail stands at 39% for H200, 40% for B200, 33% for A100, but H100 remains severely tight at just 13%, the only class signaling real scarcity. A100 spot jumped 6.6% day-over-day to $1.07/hr, the biggest single-day move in the dataset, while H200 volatility at 204% annualized screams unstable pricing on a chip nobody has figured out how to fill.
paragraphs: GPU supply is loosening fast across every class except H100. Util-avail stands at 39% for H200, 40% for B200, 33% for A100, but H100 remains severely tight at just 13%, the only class signaling real scarcity. A100 spot jumped 6.6% day-over-day to $1.07/hr, the biggest single-day move in the dataset, while H200 volatility at 204% annualized screams unstable pricing on a chip nobody has figured out how to fill.

At TCO-adjusted cost (1.25x spot), running Llama 70B on H100 costs roughly $9.75/M tokens, yet DeepSeek V3.2 sells output at $0.34/M and Meta Llama 3.3 70B at $0.32/M, both burning cash at losses exceeding $9/M tokens. OpenAI gpt-oss-120b at $0.18/M output is the most aggressive loss leader in the stack. Grades: OpenAI Burning Cash on oss-tier, DeepSeek Burning Cash, Anthropic Neutral, Google Neutral.

B200 at 40% util-avail and $5.45 OCPI is overvalued given 28pp utilization drop in 30 days, avoid new commitments. H100 at 13% util-avail and 87% utilization is the only genuinely scarce resource, making reserved H100 capacity the clearest long position in the stack.
bullets: 13% util-avail on H100 makes it the only GPU class in severe shortage territory.
40% util-avail on B200 signals emerging oversupply after a 28.4pp utilization drop in 30 days.
$0.18/M output from OpenAI gpt-oss-120b implies a per-token loss exceeding $9/M against TCO-adjusted H100 cost.
204% annualized volatility on H200 OCPI is 4.6x that of A100, making H200 the riskiest spot commitment.
21.78 on the LLMflation Index means frontier token prices have fallen 78% since GPT-4 launch.
$80/M output for o3 Pro is 235x the price of DeepSeek V3.2 output at $0.34/M.
